source_doc:
I feel like I've wasted my life.
Amounted to nothing.
George, look at me.
I know you.
You'll be okay.
You will find your way.
I don't know.

source_doc:
It looks amazing.
It's a little slime pizza pie.
Look how much it stretches.
All right, so that's mystery slime.
Oh, I've got one more secret.
I'm just gonna tell Milo, though.
That's a good one.
Can I tell him?
No.
All right.
See you guys later.
Bye.
We challenge you.
To watch zombies on Disney Channel.

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@Maker_of_Things
Ada memar atau bengkak nggak? Kalau bengkak, mending lapor ke kliniknya dan terus pantau kondisinya.
Asumsinya kalau dia ambil darah dari vena di sekitar siku, ada kemungkinan jarumnya menusuk terlalu dalam dan kena dinding belakang vena, terus tendon di bawahnya bikin memar pas jarum ditarik keluar. Semua tergantung teknik sama alatnya sih. Aku pribadi nggak pernah bisa luwes kalau pakai jarum suntik biasa, tapi lihai banget kalau pakai jarum suntik kupu-kupu (butterfly needle), rasanya bisa jauh lebih nyaman.
Semoga sekarang udah mendingan, ya.

@tempusfelix
Iya, dari sikuku. Masih agak linu sih, tapi udah mendingan. Nggak ada memar atau pendarahan kok.

@Maker_of_Things
Bagus deh. Bisa jadi dia nusuknya kemalaman, jadi inget ya, kalau nggak darurat, kamu sering kali bisa minta ditangani sama praktisi tertentu kalau di klinikmu ngebolehin. Contohnya, aku suka banget sama suster di klinikku, kerjanya halus banget.

source_doc:
Is this the final Stranger Things?
Is this it?
Has it been quite emotional?
I know you can't really tell us how it ends then, but like you reading those scripts and going through it and stuff, was it just.
Well, I haven't read the end.
I know what happens to my character.
Um, because I kind of forced myself into the writers room.
Um, so you broke in and found out?
Yes.
Basically I messaged the directors and thought, can I come over and have a meeting with you?
And then I came over and then there was a whiteboard.
So you've written your own ending?

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

hypo_0:
Lagi baca laporan investigasi Gloria Steinem pas jadi Playboy Bunny... baru selesai Bagian I dan gila sih🤔
Meskipun udah tahu banget kalau Playboy itu uh... korporasi lol... tapi beneran gak nyangka kalau seluruh infrastruktur mereka tuh bener-bener dipakai buat melanggengkan klasisme dengan cara yang super ngeri, padahal di luar mereka membranding diri sebagai opsi yang "berkelas" dan "lebih etis" dibanding Hustler, misalnya

Nanti gue bakal posting beberapa screenshot, tapi intinya, para Bunny (yang sebenarnya pramusaji koktail) harus:
- menerima upah yang lebih rendah (selisih $200-150, setara $2,5 ribu sekarang) dari yang diiklankan
- menyerahkan 50% dari semua uang tip mereka
- ngasih tahu nama belakang mereka ke "pemegang kunci nomor 1" (alias seleb/kaum elit) kalau diminta
- wajib menjalani pemeriksaan panggul dan tes darah tapi gak boleh milih dokternya sendiri
- dimata-matai sama detektif swasta
- mati-matian nyembunyiin suami/pacar mereka

Poin utama yang menyatukan semua ini:
Para Bunny SAMA SEKALI GAK BOLEH (bisa dipecat) macarin karyawan lain atau pelanggan... TAPI nemenin dan macarin "pemegang kunci nomor 1" itu dibolehkan, bahkan malah didorong. Paham kan arahnya ke mana?

Anggota baru dikasih "Alkitab Bunny" buat dipelajari semua aturan dan instruksi aneh itu.
Beberapa contoh lainnya:
- kinerja para Bunny dinilai pakai "sistem merit" (IYA, beneran pakai kata itu!) alih-alih surat peringatan tertulis. Gak heran sih, meritnya gak cuma dinilai dari etos kerja yang bagus tapi juga dari standar penampilan dan sikap yang spesifik banget.
- ada sistem insentif buat ngeganjar para Bunny yang berhasil ngejual miras dan merchandise paling banyak

Oh, great.
Here comes Jade.
Can we sit somewhere else?
Nope.
Fine.
We'll sit with the girl who can't keep her mouth shut and got you fired.
Beck, I swear, if there was anything I could do to make it up to you, I would.
I bet you would.

Oh, bagus.
Itu Jade datang.
Bisa kita duduk di tempat lain?
Nggak.
Baiklah.
Kita akan duduk dengan gadis yang tidak bisa menutup mulutnya dan membuatmu dipecat.
Beck, aku bersumpah, jika ada yang bisa kulakukan untuk menebusnya padamu, aku akan melakukannya.
Aku yakin kamu akan melakukannya.

Oh, bagus sekali.
Itu Jade datang.
Bisa kita duduk di tempat lain?
Nggak.

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Malam ini di #MMRPG! Punggungku akhirnya udah mendingan jadi aku bisa nge-GM lagi pas para pahlawan lanjut nyari Cammie, anak perempuan yang hilang. Vega si Naga Digital ngejutin trio bocah nakal yang menyelinap ke arkadenya di tengah malam, tapi salah satu dari mereka ngenalin dia sebagai pahlawan super kota dan mereka akhirnya dapet momen hangat sambil seru-seruan bareng bahas game. Sayangnya, momen itu terganggu gara-gara ada seseorang atau sesuatu yang mendarat di atap arkade... 1/?

Vega pergi buat nyelidiki dan nemuin Dr. Vesper, dalam wujud kelelawar monsternya yang dijuluki pers sebagai "Manusia Gargoyle," bareng makhluk mirip harpi yang disebut Vesper sebagai "anak didiknya." Vesper bilang kalau mereka datang buat ngenalin diri dan ngajak Vega gabung ke kelompok makhluk jadi-jadian mereka yang dipimpin sama "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton dari Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega nyari waktu buat nyelametin bocah-bocah nakal itu keluar dari arkade dan manggil anggota Mythics lainnya buat minta bantuan, terus pura-pura tertarik buat gabung ke "keluarga baru" ini. Vesper dan si Harpi (yang gak ngomong sepatah kata pun pas interaksi) ngegiring Vega ke kapal di pelabuhan, tempat Laughton Institute kayaknya lagi beresin barang-barang mereka... kemungkinan karena mereka tahu kalau mereka lagi diawasin sama Agen Carter dan A.R.G.E.N.T. 3/?

Malam ini di #MMRPG! Punggungku akhirnya udah mendingan jadi aku bisa nge-GM lagi pas para pahlawan lanjut nyari anak perempuan yang hilang, Cammie. Vega si Naga Digital ngejutin trio bocah nakal yang menyelinap ke arkadenya di tengah malam, tapi salah satu dari mereka ngenalin dia sebagai pahlawan super kota dan mereka akhirnya dapet momen hangat pas seru-seruan bareng bahas video game. Sayangnya, momen itu terganggu gara-gara ada seseorang atau sesuatu yang mendarat di atap arkade... 1/?

Vega pergi buat nyelidiki dan nemuin Dr. Vesper dalam wujud kelelawar monsternya yang dijuluki pers sebagai "Manusia Gargoyle," bareng makhluk mirip harpi yang disebut Vesper sebagai "anak didiknya." Vesper bilang kalau mereka datang buat ngenalin diri dan ngajak Vega gabung ke kelompok makhluk jadi-jadian mereka yang dipimpin sama "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton dari Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega nyari waktu buat nyelametin bocah-bocah nakal itu keluar dari arkade dan manggil anggota Mythics lainnya buat minta bantuan, terus pura-pura tertarik buat gabung ke "keluarga baru" ini. Vesper dan si Harpi (yang gak ngomong sepatah kata pun pas interaksi) ngegiring Vega ke kapal di pelabuhan, tempat Laughton Institute kayaknya lagi beres-beres... kemungkinan karena mereka tahu kalau mereka lagi narik perhatian dari Agen Carter dan A.R.G.E.N.T. 3/?

MM.
Oh.

What is it?
It's my daughter, Esther, sir.
You know Ana's girl.
She wants to go to that wedding more than anything.
So it'd mean the world to her.
Well, of course she can attend the latest.
Is that all?
Yes, sir.
Thank you very much, sir.

Yes.
No bath.
Best shower of my life.
I thought I would do an unboxing together.
I kind of want to take these home.
They're the Ritz slippers, and my room service is here.
That's why I switched from a bath to a shower.
Because I wanted to hurry up so I can eat food.
Oh my gosh, are you kidding me?
So cute.

source_doc:
The last time I was out here, you could see 27 miles across northwest Alabama.
You getting tired of the view?
No.
The trouble is that the birds keep on flying into the glass because they can't see it and break their wings.
Well, why don't you just throw an old fishnet over the window?
That way you'd have your view and your birds.
Well, I just guess and calculate.
I never thought of it.
You know, I swear, if a fly was to bust his leg, he'd come running with a splint.

Okay.

Really?

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@la Bukannya aturan #1 dalam permesinan itu kalau belum diratain permukaannya, berarti belum siku atau rata?

@azonenberg iya sih bener banget, tapi gue emang *berniat* buat ngeratain permukaannya kok. Cuma setelan nol pahat gue aja yang salah.
Soalnya gue kira permukaannya udah lumayan rata.
Hari ini gue bikin part cadangan. Bahannya masih ada kok. Dan kalau nggak dibikin, bakal kepikiran terus deh. Lagian, pas lagi ngepasin bantalannya, lem yang nempel part ke pelatnya lepas, jadi ya harus disetel ulang lagi posisinya, dan gue males bangeeeet, jadi ya udah lah.....

@la Paham banget gue rasanya.
Pernah ngalamin masalah mirip pas lagi ngerjain rumah, yang mana bener-bener semua titik acuan yang mau dipake tuh salah semua.
Gue minta tukang pasang kusen pintu biar tegak lurus dan siku. Tapi abis dia pergi, terpaksa gue bongkar lagi beberapa tiang penyangganya karena pintunya harus agak miring dikit biar pas sama lantai dan nggak ngambang sebelah.
Ada lagi dinding lain (yang setengah badan) yang tiap tiang penyangganya harus dipotong pas banget ukurannya karena nggak ada satu pun yang sama panjang... Lantainya nggak rata, jadi biar meja counternya bisa rata, dindingnya harus dibikin jajar genjang, bukan persegi panjang

@azonenberg iya, jelas dong, tapi gue emang *berniat* buat ngeface permukaannya kok. Cuma setelan titik nol pahat gue aja yang salah.
Soalnya gue kira permukaannya udah lumayan rata.
Hari ini gue bikin part tambahan. Stok bahannya masih ada kok. Dan kalau nggak dibikin, bakal kepikiran terus deh. Lagian, pas lagi ngepasin bantalannya, lem yang nempel part ke pelatnya lepas, jadi ya harus diset ulang lagi posisinya pake indikator, dan gue males bangeeeet, jadi ya udah lah.....

@la Paham banget gue rasanya.
Pernah ngalamin masalah mirip pas lagi ngerjain rumah, yang mana bener-bener semua titik acuan yang mau dipake tuh salah semua.
Gue minta tukang pasang kusen pintu biar tegak lurus dan siku. Tapi pas dia udah pergi, terpaksa gue bongkar lagi beberapa tiang penyangganya karena pintunya harus agak miring dikit biar pas rata sama lantai dan nggak ngambang sebelah.
Ada lagi dinding lain (yang setengah badan) yang tiap tiangnya harus dipotong pas banget ukurannya karena nggak ada satu pun yang sama panjang... Lantainya nggak rata, jadi biar meja counternya bisa rata, dindingnya harus dibikin jajar genjang, bukan persegi panjang

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Oiya, ngomong-ngomong, gue baru aja lihat ada yang ngeluh soal game yang ngebujuk kita buat ganti ke mode gampang pas kita kalah.
Gue juga benci banget nih yang begini.
Gue seneng sih ada mode gampang. Malah menurut gue, game harusnya bebasin aja pemainnya buat ngecheat, selama di kompetisi resmi ada aturan yang disepakatin soal itu.
Tapi semua game yang maksa gue buat masuk ke mode gampang langsung gue matiin saat itu juga. Game gue masih banyak yang bisa dimainin, jadi kalau emang mau gue kelar lebih cepet, selamat deh, gue emang kelar lebih cepet.

Ini nih yang bikin game-game Mario modern—atau ya yang lumayan baru lah—jadi malesin banget buat dimainin.
"Kamu mati tiga kali ya, Mawwio? Nih, pake baju super emas anti-mati karena kamu payah! Kalau gak mau pake, ya musti ati-ati banget biar gak kepencet apa pun selain 'mulai level ya lagi gak gak gak yang lain pokoknya mulai level aja'."
Ini juga alasan kenapa gue gak lanjut main Phantom Pain. Tiap kali mati, game-nya selalu nawarin topi ayam dan otomatis milih "ya", sampe akhirnya gue lupa buat ngeklik "ogah".

Gue paham sih ini biar pemain gak bosen dan kabur, tapi kok rasanya gak ngehargain banget ya.
Tingkat kesulitan yang otomatis berubah sendiri juga bikin gue emosi, soalnya pas gue lagi siap-siap buat ngadepin tantangan, eh game-nya malah panik dan nurunin tingkat kesulitannya jadi gampang banget cuma gara-gara gue kelihatan "kesulitan".
Pas gue mati atau gimana gitu, terus mau coba lagi, eh tantangannya udah ilang. Lu berhasil! Lu bikin game-nya ilang! Tenang aja, tantangan tadi itu buat orang lain kok. Buat orang yang lebih jago.
Gue bahkan lupa apa pernah namatin game yang tingkat kesulitannya otomatis berubah sendiri.

Kayaknya perbedaan mendasar antara gue sama target pasar mereka adalah gue suka nyari tahu cara nyelesein sesuatu, sedangkan target pasar mereka—seenggaknya di pikiran mereka—itu sukanya duduk manis nikmatin wahana air di Disneyworld.
Ada goyangan dikit, kecipratan dikit, tapi tenang aja sayang, papi Walt bakal jagain kamu. Kamu aman kok, gak usah ngapa-ngapain, tinggal duduk manis aja sambil ketawa-ketiwi pas kecipratan air dikit.
Kalau gue pengen yang kayak gitu, mending gue pergi ke taman anjing terus ngelus-ngelus anjing sekalian.

Kalau gue pengen yang kayak gitu, mending gue pergi ke taman anjing terus ngelus-ngelus anjing sekalian.
hypo_6:
Oiya, ngomong-ngomong, baru aja gue liat ada yang ngeluh soal game yang ngebujuk kita buat ganti ke mode gampang pas kita gagal.
Gue juga benci banget nih yang begini.
Gue seneng kok ada mode gampang. Malah menurut gue, game harusnya bebasin aja pemainnya buat ngecheat, persetan lah, yang penting di kompetisi resmi ada aturan yang disepakati soal itu.
Tapi semua game yang maksa-maksa gue buat masuk ke mode gampang langsung gue matiin saat itu juga. Game yang bisa gue mainin masih banyak, jadi kalau emang mau gue kelar lebih cepet, selamat ya, gue emang kelar lebih cepet.

Ini nih yang bikin game-game Mario modern—atau ya yang agak baru lah—jadi mustahil banget buat gue mainin.
"Kamu mati tiga kali ya, Mawwio? Nih, pake baju super emas anti-mati karena kamu payah! Kalau gak mau pake, ya musti ati-ati banget biar gak kepencet apa pun selain 'mulai level ya lagi gak gak gak yang lain pokoknya mulai level aja'."
Ini juga alasan kenapa gue gak lanjut main Phantom Pain. Tiap kali mati, game-nya selalu nawarin topi ayam dan otomatis milih "ya", sampe akhirnya gue lupa buat ngeklik "ogah".

Gue paham sih ini biar pemain gak kabur, tapi kok rasanya gak ngehargain banget ya.
Tingkat kesulitan yang otomatis berubah sendiri juga bikin gue emosi, soalnya pas gue lagi siap-siap buat ngadepin tantangan, eh game-nya malah panik dan nurunin tingkat kesulitannya jadi gampang banget cuma gara-gara gue kelihatan "kesulitan".
Pas gue mati atau gimana gitu, terus mau coba lagi, eh tantangannya udah ilang. Lu berhasil! Lu bikin tantangan game-nya ilang! Tenang aja, tantangan tadi itu buat orang lain kok. Buat orang yang lebih jago.
Gue bahkan lupa apa pernah namatin game yang tingkat kesulitannya otomatis berubah sendiri.

source_doc:
Dreyfus.
What does that look?
Libby is dead, which means I don't have a wife.
You don't have lamb chops.
Oh, gosh, she spoiled you rotten.
Dreyfus.
Hey, doctor.
Weston.
Hi, Emily.
Baby.
How are you?
Midterms over?
Uh, but that's a relief.
So it's sunny up there in New York, huh?

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Aku baru aja mimpi indah banget #dream temenan sama Lee Chaeyeon. Aku cuma mulai ngobrol sama dia dan tau-tau aku udah nginep di rumahnya (kayak pas orang Prancis nyulik aku pas Natal) dan dia nyuruh aku ke lantai atas buat "shuffle up a little bit" (bahasa Inggrisnya secara umum bagus banget) yang dia maksud adalah "merapikan sedikit" buat nunjukin ke ibunya kalau kita udah siap makan.
Dia naik ke lantai atas buat "merapikan" kamarnya dan mulai bikin isyarat buat ngejelasin maksudnya ...
1/

(dia selalu kelihatan seneng banget ketemu aku di mimpi ini) gara-gara aku malah ngelepas jaket bukannya "merapikan diri".
Terus dia nunjukin secarik kertas kecil dan bilang dia udah ninggalin tanda tangan buat aku, tapi imbalannya dia mau kartu koleksi kecil yang aku bikin pas kelas dua SD bertema "50 Spikes," tiruan Sonic, yang jelas dengan duri yang lebih banyak. (Kartu ini beneran ada di dunia nyata lho). Aku mulai ngejelasin ke dia itu kartu apa dan kalau dia emang beneran mau (dia mau banget), setidaknya aku butuh foto dia lagi megang kartu itu.
2/

Sebagian karena aku bakal kangen sama kartu itu, tapi juga karena kalau enggak, gak bakal ada yang percaya kalau dia pernah menginginkan barang ini dari aku.
Saat itulah aku sadar kalau kita bahkan belum saling punya nomor telepon masing-masing.
3/3

(dia selalu kelihatan seneng banget ketemu aku di mimpi ini) gara-gara aku malah ngelepas jaket bukannya "beres-beres".
Terus dia nunjukin secarik kertas kecil dan bilang dia udah ninggalin tanda tangan buat aku, tapi imbalannya dia mau kartu mainan kecil yang aku bikin pas kelas dua SD bertema "50 Spikes," tiruan Sonic yang jelas-jelas durinya lebih banyak. (Kartu ini beneran ada di dunia nyata lho btw). Aku mulai ngejelasin ke dia itu kartu apa dan kalau dia emang beneran mau (dan dia emang mau), setidaknya aku butuh foto dia lagi megang kartu itu.
2/

Sebagian karena aku bakal kangen sama kartu itu, tapi juga karena kalau gak gitu, gak bakal ada yang percaya kalau dia pengen barang ini dari aku.
Pas itulah aku baru sadar kalau kita bahkan belum saling punya nomor HP.
3/3

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

Cloudhorizon Waterproof terasa dirancang khusus untuk ritme perjalanan komuter musim dingin yang sering terhenti. Bagian atasnya yang tahan air dan ringan menjaga kaki Anda tetap kering tanpa menambah beban, dan bentuk melengkung sepatu yang mulus membantu Anda melangkah maju dengan mudah, bahkan saat Anda mengenakan pakaian berlapis dan membawa beban berat.

Di bagian tapak, busa Helion menciptakan pantulan empuk yang melembutkan langkah dalam berjalan jauh di antara stasiun, sementara sol luar karet yang mencengkeram menjaga kestabilan di anak tangga yang basah dan ubin yang licin. Desainnya yang minimalis memberikan tampilan yang apik dan modern, ideal jika Anda menyukai sepatu kets yang mampu mengatasi cuaca buruk secara samar, tanpa menonjolkan fitur teknisnya.

source_doc:
They got so many trains out there, they got a hard time keeping them running into each other.
Got trains going every which way.
Got people on all of them.
Somebody going, well, somebody just left.
I believe everybody stayed in one place.
This be a better world.
Now.
What I done learnt in 27 years of railroading is this.

source_doc:
I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.
And lose a relative.
Well, we all lose relatives.
Sometimes I think they were created for the purpose.
Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Argumen untuk Memakzulkan Donald Trump

Bom di Amerika Latin: Jika Anda bertanya kepada saya, ini mengingatkan kita pada film Wag the Dog. Pemerintahan Trump, yang tampaknya sangat berhasrat untuk menghidupkan kembali penaklukan militer neokonservatif, meluncurkan perang perubahan rezim terbarunya secara terselubung di Venezuela dengan melakukan serangan tanpa pandang bulu terhadap kapal-kapal di perairan Karibia dan Pasifik di lepas pantai Amerika Tengah. Serangan-serangan ini, yang semuanya dilakukan tanpa pengawasan Kongres sedikit pun dan dengan premis meragukan bahwa kapal-kapal tersebut penuh dengan fentanil yang ditujukan ke Amerika Serikat, pada dasarnya sudah tergolong pembunuhan. Namun, kabar bahwa militer diperintahkan untuk menyerang kapal yang sudah hancur dalam serangan "double tap" untuk membunuh korban yang selamat telah memunculkan bayang-bayang kejahatan perang - dan dengan cara yang bahkan tidak dapat ditoleransi oleh banyak politisi Republik.

Kawan Binance Trump mendapat pengampunan: Changpeng Zhao memulai tahun ini sebagai mantan CEO Binance yang tercemar nama baiknya. Binance, bursa mata uang kripto terbesar di dunia, sempat membuatnya mendekam di penjara karena, seperti yang dinyatakan oleh Departemen Kehakiman era Biden, "gagal mempertahankan program anti-pencucian uang (AML) yang efektif," melanggar Undang-Undang Keamanan Bank, dan membiarkan uang mengalir bebas ke sejumlah aktor jahat, termasuk "teroris, penjahat siber, dan pelaku pelecehan anak." Namun Zhao, setelah kehilangan hak untuk menjalankan Binance, ingin kembali masuk. Jadi, ia menggunakan koneksinya dengan keluarga dan lingkaran dalam Trump untuk mendapatkan pengampunan yang memungkinkannya memimpin kembali perusahaan tersebut. Sebagai imbalannya, Zhao mencurahkan perhatiannya pada World Liberty Financial - menggunakan pengaruh Binance untuk memperkaya dana kripto pribadi Trump. Tim Noah dari TNR sangat murka dengan kesepakatan gelap tersebut.

Cip ke Tiongkok: Berbicara tentang Tim Noah dan kemurkaannya: Mungkin bukan hal yang baik bahwa satu perusahaan, Nvidia, telah memiliki kekuatan luar biasa yang dapat menggerakkan pasar. Pentingnya perusahaan ini bagi ekonomi global membuat Noah menunjuknya sebagai salah satu pilar utama yang akan runtuh, ketika ia menganalisis potensi jatuhnya pasar saham era Trump pada bulan Oktober lalu. Namun, Trump telah melakukan apa yang ia bisa untuk mendongkrak keberuntungan Nvidia: Tahun ini, sang presiden melanggar tradisi keamanan nasional yang telah berlangsung lama dan mengumumkan bahwa ia mengizinkan perusahaan tersebut menjual cip H200 miliknya ke Tiongkok. Seperti yang dicatat oleh David Sanger dari The New York Times, kesepakatan tersebut - hasil dari "lobi intensif" dari CEO Nvidia dan sosok yang sering mendekati Gedung Putih, Jensen Huang - menimbulkan pertanyaan mendasar: "Jika cip yang menggerakkan teknologi paling canggih dapat dijual kepada pesaing utama teknologi, militer, dan finansial Amerika Serikat, di mana batas baru akan ditarik?" Namun, itu mungkin kekhawatiran terkecil Trump: Kesepakatan itu juga menjamin bahwa "25 persen dari semua pendapatan dari penjualan tersebut akan masuk ke Amerika Serikat," dalam kasus lain yang menunjukkan kecintaan pemerintahan ini pada korporatisme fasis.

Perannya yang terlampau besar bagi ekonomi global membuat Noah menunjuknya sebagai salah satu pilar utama yang akan runtuh, saat ia menganalisis potensi jatuhnya pasar saham di bawah pemerintahan Trump pada bulan Oktober lalu. Namun, Trump telah melakukan apa yang ia bisa untuk mendongkrak keuntungan Nvidia: Tahun ini, sang presiden melanggar tradisi keamanan nasional yang telah berlangsung lama dan mengumumkan bahwa ia mengizinkan perusahaan tersebut menjual cip H200 miliknya ke Tiongkok. Seperti yang dicatat oleh David Sanger dari The New York Times, kesepakatan tersebut—hasil dari "lobi intensif" dari CEO Nvidia sekaligus sosok yang sering mendekati Gedung Putih, Jensen Huang—menimbulkan pertanyaan mendasar: "Jika cip yang menggerakkan teknologi paling canggih dapat dijual kepada pesaing utama teknologi, militer, dan finansial Amerika Serikat, di mana batas baru akan ditarik?" Namun, itu mungkin kekhawatiran terkecil bagi Trump: Kesepakatan itu juga menjamin bahwa "25 persen dari semua pendapatan dari penjualan tersebut akan masuk ke kas Amerika Serikat," yang menjadi contoh nyata lainnya dari kecintaan pemerintahan ini pada korporatisme fasis.

Serangan-serangan ini, yang semuanya dilakukan tanpa pengawasan Kongres sedikit pun dan atas dasar asumsi meragukan bahwa kapal-kapal tersebut penuh dengan fentanil yang ditujukan ke Amerika Serikat, pada dasarnya sudah tergolong tindakan pembunuhan. Namun, kabar bahwa militer diperintahkan untuk menyerang kapal yang sudah hancur dalam serangan lanjutan "double tap" demi menghabisi korban yang selamat telah memunculkan bayang-bayang kejahatan perang—dan dengan cara yang bahkan tidak dapat ditoleransi oleh banyak politisi Republik.

Namun Zhao, setelah kehilangan hak untuk mengelola Binance, ingin kembali berkuasa. Jadi, ia menggunakan koneksinya dengan keluarga dan lingkaran dalam Trump untuk mendapatkan pengampunan presiden yang memungkinkannya memimpin kembali perusahaan tersebut. instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:

Ini juga kayak berantakan banget.
Ini tidak benar-benar menggoreng.
Benar-benar bingung.
Saya biarkan saja zucchini-nya jatuh ke dasar.
Saya takut ini akan gagal total.
Apakah ini menggoreng?

People need to take care of their health.
So a few tips on that.
I think my diet is a bit strict.
Can you expand on your dieting shtick?
Was it strict before?
It was nowhere close to what it is now.
When you were a teenager.
Oh, everything.
Everything.
I was a big foodie.
Like junk food.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
dan ini bukan film yang jelek — secara visual emang kelihatan spektakuler di beberapa bagian — tapi ini juga film yang sepenuhnya dibuat dari film-film lain yang lebih bagus dan secara tematis lebih kohesif. jadi ini kayak 2001 dan the three-body problem dan arrival dan agak mirip wall-e juga, tapi ini juga kayak Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII dan pada akhirnya ya biasa aja

pas nonton gue sempat mikir kenapa bumi harus dalam bahaya, dan apakah kematian dua kru multikultural lainnya yang menyisakan si Pria Kulit Putih sebagai pemimpin itu semacam pernyataan anti-woke; tapi kalau melihat beberapa komentar dari penulis bukunya, andy weir, si 'libertarian paling melek media' tentang bagaimana star trek harusnya cuma tentang kapal luar angkasa yang tembak-tembakan, setidaknya bagi dia jawabannya adalah ya untuk yang terakhir dan 'fasisme' untuk yang pertama

@esvrld gue baca bukunya beberapa waktu lalu dan mungkin gue terlalu berekspektasi tinggi ke dia, terutama mengingat keputusannya baru-baru ini buat asal ngomong, tapi gue menganggap kematian kru internasional yang menyisakan si cowok kulit putih itu sebagai bentuk kesadaran kalau buku keduanya gagal karena dia emang gak jago nulis interaksi antarmanusia dan satu-satunya keahlian dia adalah bikin teka-teki pintar untuk diselesaikan sama karakter yang merupakan proyeksi dirinya sendiri dalam kesendirian total. Ngasih dia teman alien itu langkah yang bagus karena membuka peluang interaksi karakter tanpa harus membuatnya mirip dengan cara manusia berhubungan satu sama lain

pas nonton gue sempat mikir kenapa sih bumi harus dalam bahaya, dan apa kematian dua anggota kru multikultural lainnya yang menyisakan si Pria Kulit Putih sebagai pemimpin itu semacam pernyataan anti-woke; tapi kalau melihat beberapa komentar dari penulis bukunya, andy weir, si 'libertarian paling melek media' tentang gimana star trek harusnya cuma tentang kapal luar angkasa yang tembak-tembakan, setidaknya bagi dia jawabannya adalah ya buat yang terakhir dan 'fasisme' buat yang pertama

@esvrld gue sempat baca bukunya beberapa waktu lalu dan mungkin gue terlalu mengapresiasi dia, terutama melihat keputusannya baru-baru ini buat asal ngomong, tapi gue menganggap kematian kru internasional yang bikin si cowok kulit putih terdampar sendirian itu sebagai bentuk kesadaran kalau buku keduanya gagal karena dia emang gak jago nulis interaksi antarmanusia dan satu-satunya keahlian dia cuma bikin teka-teki pintar buat diselesaikan sama karakter proyeksi dirinya dalam kesendirian total. Ngasih dia teman alien itu langkah yang bagus karena membuka peluang interaksi karakter tanpa harus membuatnya mirip dengan cara manusia berhubungan satu sama lain

About muscle building?

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@afewbugs Aku juga pernah lihat yang kayak gini, aku agak khawatir anggota baru mungkin gak bakal nemu grup kayak gitu di dunia nyata sekarang karena mereka makin jarang main sosmed jadul. Contohnya, ada yang nyoba ngebagiin dua sepeda kayuh yang perlu diservis dan gak ada yang minat sama sekali di Facebook. Padahal beberapa tahun lalu, gak sampai sepuluh menit pasti udah langsung ada yang ngambil. Aku dapet satu dan nyesel banget gak bisa ambil yang kedua. Sama halnya kayak aksi mungut sampah dan kebun komunitas.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Aku malah lebih hoki nawarin barang lewat Facebook Marketplace akhir-akhir ini dibanding lewat Gumtree, dan aku males banget pakai eBay buat barang-barang yang kegedean buat dipos. Tapi mungkin ini tergantung banget sama lokasi sih, apalagi kalau soal sepeda!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace juga salah satu hal besar yang bikin aku bertahan di Facebook. Dulu aku pikir buat tetap komunikasi sama temen-temen, tapi sekarang aku hampir gak pernah lagi ngelihat postingan temen asliku. Jadi sekarang ya kebanyakan cuma buat Marketplace, grup lokal, sama kenyataan kalau sebagian besar bisnis lokal bahkan perpustakaan sekalipun cuma pasang jam buka, acara khusus, dll di Facebook

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Aku malah lebih hoki ngejual barang lewat Facebook Marketplace akhir-akhir ini dibanding pakai Gumtree lagi, dan aku males banget pakai eBay buat barang-barang yang kegedean buat dipos. Tapi mungkin ini tergantung banget sama lokasi sih, apalagi kalau soal sepeda!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace juga jadi alasan utama yang bikin aku bertahan di Facebook. Dulu aku pikir buat tetap kontak-kontakan sama temen, tapi sekarang aku hampir gak pernah lagi ngelihat postingan temen asliku, jadi sekarang ya kebanyakan cuma buat Marketplace, grup lokal, sama kenyataan kalau sebagian besar bisnis lokal bahkan perpustakaan sekalipun cuma pasang info jam buka, acara khusus, dll di Facebook

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.

hypo_0:
Dua Gol Ashley Barnes Bawa Burnley Raih Kemenangan Penting atas Millwall

Ashley Barnes mencetak dua gol saat Burnley sejenak melupakan kekhawatiran mereka di Liga Primer untuk melaju mulus ke putaran keempat Piala FA dengan kemenangan 5-1 atas Millwall.

Pemain berusia 36 tahun itu mencetak gol pertamanya musim ini di awal laga dan menambahkan gol keduanya di pertengahan babak kedua, saat kesalahan-kesalahan yang dilakukan skuad The Lions memberi tim tuan rumah yang tampil percaya diri kemenangan yang sangat meyakinkan.

Manajer Scott Parker melakukan delapan perubahan pada tim yang turun sebagai starter dalam hasil imbang 2-2 hari Rabu melawan Manchester United, dan mereka tidak mengecewakan, dengan gol-gol tambahan dari Loum Tchaouna dan Jaidon Anthony membuat mereka unggul jauh sebelum turun minum.

Pemain pengganti Jaydon Banel mencetak gol kelima Burnley tepat pada menit ke-90 sebelum The Lions yang tampak terguncang dan telah menyerah sepenuhnya, mencetak gol hiburan di masa tambahan waktu melalui Josh Coburn.

Burnley mendominasi jalannya menit-menit awal pertandingan dan memimpin pada menit ke-11 ketika umpan tarik Jacob Bruun Larsen diselesaikan dengan sempurna oleh Barnes untuk menaklukkan penjaga gawang tim tamu, Steven Benda.

The Lions tidak banyak memberikan respons, dengan Aidomo Emakhu melepaskan peluang terbaik mereka tepat ke arah kiper Burnley, Max Weiss, setelah lolos di sisi kiri berkat umpan Joe Bryan.

Namun, tim tamu perlahan mulai berkembang dan seharusnya bisa menyamakan kedudukan ketika sundulan Jake Cooper menyambut umpan silang Alfie Doughty dari sisi kiri berhasil digagalkan oleh penyelamatan gemilang Weiss.

Sang kiper kembali melakukan penyelamatan dari sundulan Cooper pada menit ke-30 saat Millwall mengancam untuk menyamakan kedudukan, tetapi tim tamu harus membayar mahal akibat dua kesalahan pertahanan yang membuat pertandingan berada di luar jangkauan mereka.

Tchaouna dibiarkan melepaskan tembakan kaki kiri dari tepi kotak penalti melewati Benda yang terpaku pada menit ke-35, dan sesaat sebelum jeda, sapuan buruk dari kiper Millwall tersebut akhirnya memberikan kesempatan bagi Anthony untuk menyontek bola masuk guna mencetak gol ketiga timnya.

Millwall tampak lebih hidup di awal babak kedua dan Thierno Ballo seharusnya bisa tampil lebih baik ketika ia mendapatkan ruang untuk melepaskan tembakan di sisi kiri kotak penalti, tetapi tim tuan rumah jelas memegang kendali penuh permainan.

Tchaouna nyaris mencetak gol keduanya saat tembakan kerasnya membentur bagian luar tiang kanan gawang Benda, dan gol keempat yang tampaknya tak terhindarkan akhirnya tercipta pada menit ke-65 ketika Kamarl Grant melakukan kesalahan saat menghalau umpan silang Anthony dari sisi kanan, yang langsung disambar dengan gembira oleh Barnes.

Demi memburu trigol, Barnes melepaskan sundulan yang mengarah tepat ke Benda saat bendera hakim garis diangkat, tetapi justru Banel yang menyempurnakan pesta gol dari jarak dekat sebelum penyelesaian tenang Coburn di masa tambahan waktu.

Burnley mendominasi jalannya menit-menit awal pertandingan dan membuka keunggulan pada menit ke-11 saat umpan tarik Jacob Bruun Larsen diselesaikan dengan sempurna oleh Barnes untuk menaklukkan kiper tim tamu, Steven Benda.

The Lions tidak banyak memberikan respons, dengan peluang terbaik dari Aidomo Emakhu yang melepaskan tembakan tepat ke arah kiper Burnley, Max Weiss, setelah lolos di sisi kiri berkat umpan Joe Bryan.

Namun, tim tamu perlahan mulai berkembang dan seharusnya bisa menyamakan kedudukan ketika sundulan Jake Cooper menyambut umpan silang Alfie Doughty dari sisi kiri berhasil digagalkan oleh penyelamatan gemilang Weiss.

Sang kiper kembali mementahkan peluang Cooper pada menit ke-30 saat Millwall mengancam untuk menyamakan skor, tetapi tim tamu harus membayar mahal akibat dua kesalahan lini pertahanan yang membuat pertandingan berada di luar jangkauan mereka.

Tchaouna dibiarkan melepaskan tembakan kaki kiri dari luar kotak penalti melewati Benda yang terpaku pada menit ke-35, dan sesaat sebelum jeda, sapuan buruk dari kiper Millwall tersebut akhirnya memberikan kesempatan bagi Anthony untuk menyontek bola masuk guna mencetak gol ketiga timnya.

Millwall tampil lebih hidup di awal babak kedua dan Thierno Ballo seharusnya bisa berbuat lebih baik ketika ia mendapatkan ruang untuk melepaskan tembakan di sisi kiri kotak penalti, tetapi tim tuan rumah jelas telah memegang kendali penuh permainan.

Tchaouna nyaris mencetak gol keduanya saat tembakan kerasnya membentur bagian luar tiang kanan gawang Benda, dan gol keempat yang tampaknya tak terhindarkan akhirnya tercipta pada menit ke-65 ketika Kamarl Grant melakukan kesalahan saat menghalau umpan silang Anthony dari sisi kanan, yang langsung disambar dengan mudah oleh Barnes.

Demi memburu hat-trick, Barnes melepaskan sundulan yang mengarah tepat ke Benda saat bendera hakim garis diangkat, tetapi justru Banel yang menyempurnakan pesta gol dari jarak dekat sebelum penyelesaian tenang Coburn di masa tambahan waktu.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Lagi nyetrika bahan korduroi hijau yang enteng buat nyobain pola Topi Newsboy Sachi's Studio untuk pertama kalinya. Agak ragu sih sama saran buat pakai viselin, tapi kayaknya emang butuh sesuatu biar bahannya agak kaku dan tebelan dikit.
#millinery

Di pola topi newsboy Sachi disaranin buat motong bagian atasnya diagonal dari serat kain ("serong") biar lebih melar di sekeliling lingkarannya, tapi itu bakal bikin garis korduroinya jadi miring, padahal aku lebih suka garisnya vertikal.
Kita lihat aja nanti. Ini baru uji coba buat ngerasain polanya. Aku suka korduroi karena teksturnya, tapi warna hijau bukan pilihan utamaku, dan kain ini tipis banget jadi kayaknya harus aku lapisin lagi, entah pakai viselin atau apa pun yang ada di tumpukan bahan.

Pas dilihat-lihat lagi, kainku ternyata bukan korduroi sama sekali, melainkan cuma beludru biasa, jadi aku bisa motong 45° dari serat kain kayak yang disaranin Sachi di pola Topi Newsboy dan hasilnya gak bakal kelihatan aneh.
#millinery

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

hypo_0:
Kandang Lokal Incar Kemenangan di Coffs dengan Empat Kontestan

Pelatih lokal Noel Mayfield-Smith berharap dapat meraih hari yang menguntungkan pada pertemuan hari Minggu di Coffs Harbour dengan menurunkan empat kuda dari kandangnya dalam program enam balapan.

Penunggang kuda pemenang Group 1 ini akan memulai harinya di nomor kedua ketika Ausbred Yahoo berlaga di Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) dengan dipacu oleh joki magang dengan pengurangan beban dua kilogram, Ella Drew.

Balapan kembali digelar di Coffs Harbour pada hari Minggu.

Ausbred Yahoo berada dalam performa yang baik dengan finis di posisi ketiga di Kempsey tiga laga lalu, yang diikuti oleh dua kali finis kedua berturut-turut di Coffs Harbour, yang terbaru saat dikalahkan oleh rival hari Minggu ini, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith bekerja sama dengan joki magang lainnya, Leanne Boyd yang mendapat pengurangan beban tiga kilogram, saat Never Island berlaga di Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Pemenang tiga dari 15 laganya, Never Island akan membawa beban 59,5 kilogram setelah pengurangan beban Boyd. Never Island kalah kurang dari satu panjang kuda saat finis kedua di belakang Montgomery di Grafton dan melanjutkannya dengan finis kelima pada laga terakhirnya di Coffs Harbour di belakang In The Fine Print, di mana ia kembali kalah kurang dari satu panjang kuda.

Raymond Spokes akan menunggangi Monte Cruise yang dilatih oleh Mayfield-Smith dalam ajang O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise juga merupakan pemenang tiga kali dari hanya sembilan laga. Ia belum pernah balapan lagi sejak Juli ketika finis terakhir dari delapan peserta di Eagle Farm, dan telah menjalani dua kali uji coba di lintasan ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembali berlaga, finis kedua di belakang pemenang hari Sabtu di Wyong, Petticoat, sebelum memenangkan uji coba terakhir.

Mayfield-Smith menutup hari itu dengan kembali bekerja sama dengan Boyd yang akan menunggangi Cardsharp di nomor Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Kandang Lokal Incar Keuntungan di Coffs dengan Empat Kuda Andalan

Pelatih lokal Noel Mayfield-Smith berharap dapat meraih hari yang menguntungkan pada balapan hari Minggu di Coffs Harbour dengan menurunkan empat kuda dari kandangnya dalam program yang menyajikan enam balapan tersebut.

Pelatih pemenang laga Group 1 ini akan memulai harinya di balapan kedua saat Ausbred Yahoo bertarung di kelas Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605 m), dengan joki magang Ella Drew yang mendapatkan dispensasi berat dua kilogram bertindak sebagai penunggang.

Gelaran balapan kembali hadir di Coffs Harbour pada hari Minggu.

Ausbred Yahoo tengah berada dalam performa yang bagus, dengan raihan posisi ketiga di Kempsey tiga laga lalu diikuti oleh dua kali finis kedua berturut-turut di Coffs Harbour, yang terakhir saat dikalahkan oleh calon rivalnya hari Minggu nanti, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith akan bekerja sama dengan joki magang lainnya, Leanne Boyd yang mendapatkan dispensasi tiga kilogram, saat Never Island turun di kelas Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

Mengantongi tiga kemenangan dari 15 laga yang telah dijalani, Never Island akan membawa beban seberat 59,5 kilogram setelah dikurangi dispensasi untuk Boyd. Raymond Spokes akan menunggangi Monte Cruise yang dilatih oleh Mayfield-Smith dalam ajang O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205 m).

Monte Cruise juga merupakan pemenang tiga kali dari baru sembilan laga yang diikutinya. Kuda ini belum pernah balapan lagi sejak Juli lalu saat finis di posisi terakhir dari delapan peserta di Eagle Farm, dan telah menjalani dua kali uji coba di lintasan ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembali bertanding, dengan finis kedua di belakang pemenang hari Sabtu di Wyong, Petticoat, sebelum akhirnya memenangi uji coba yang terbaru.

Mayfield-Smith akan menutup hari itu dengan kembali berkolaborasi bersama Boyd yang akan menunggangi Cardsharp di kelas Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

Pelatih pemenang ajang Group 1 ini akan memulai harinya di balapan kedua saat Ausbred Yahoo bertarung di kelas Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605 m), dengan joki magang Ella Drew yang mendapatkan dispensasi beban dua kilogram bertindak sebagai penunggang.

Gelaran balap kuda kembali hadir di Coffs Harbour pada hari Minggu ini.

Ausbred Yahoo tengah berada dalam performa yang bagus, dengan raihan posisi ketiga di Kempsey tiga laga lalu diikuti oleh dua kali finis kedua berturut-turut di Coffs Harbour, yang terakhir saat dikalahkan oleh calon rivalnya hari Minggu nanti, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith akan bekerja sama dengan joki magang lainnya, Leanne Boyd yang mendapatkan dispensasi tiga kilogram, saat Never Island turun di kelas Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

Mengantongi tiga kemenangan dari 15 laga yang telah dijalani, Never Island akan membawa beban seberat 59,5 kilogram setelah dikurangi dispensasi beban untuk Boyd. Never Island kalah tipis kurang dari satu panjang kuda saat finis kedua di belakang Montgomery di Grafton, dan melanjutkan performa tersebut dengan finis kelima pada laga terakhirnya di Coffs Harbour di belakang In The Fine Print, yang juga dengan selisih kekalahan kurang dari satu panjang kuda.

Raymond Spokes akan menunggangi Monte Cruise yang dilatih oleh Mayfield-Smith dalam ajang O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205 m).

Monte Cruise juga merupakan pemenang tiga kali dari baru sembilan laga yang diikutinya. Kuda ini belum pernah balapan lagi sejak Juli lalu saat finis di posisi terakhir dari delapan peserta di Eagle Farm, dan telah menjalani dua kali uji coba di lintasan ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembali bertanding, dengan finis kedua di belakang pemenang hari Sabtu di Wyong, Petticoat, sebelum akhirnya memenangi uji coba terbaru.

Mayfield-Smith akan menutup hari itu dengan kembali berkolaborasi bersama Boyd yang akan menunggangi Cardsharp di kelas Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. hypo_0:
@hacks4pancakes Menurutmu apa sih yang sebenarnya terjadi?
Bingung? Cemas? Disfungsi Eksekutif? Gak realistis? Males banget?
(Gua BUKAN menyamakan neurodivergen dengan kemalasan dalam pemahaman pribadi gua di sini, tapi gua penasaran apa salah satunya mungkin ikut berpengaruh...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Setidaknya untuk urusan migrasi, gua bisa bayangin diri gua bakal bilang "wah gua iri banget, gua Pengen BANGET kayak gitu" padahal kenyataannya ada alasan internal atau eksternal yang bikin gua gak mau/gak bisa, dan bantuan logistik dari orang lain pun gak bakal mengubah hal itu, jadi gua bakal nolak secara halus.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes Cara dewasa buat nolak secara halus itu harusnya "Gua terlalu terburu-buru kemarin: gua gak bisa ngelakuin itu karena ada alasan lain, padahal gua pengen banget", bukan malah beralasan karena masalah jadwal!

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

Sit down.

A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Ada kemajuan setelah sekian lama libur. Aku keluarin mesin jahit buat ngerjain bagian visor sama jahitan crown. Setengah crown sama visornya udah kejahit, ditaruh di atas pola kertasnya. Tadi sempat harus mendeder dan menjahit ulang jahitan mesinnya karena aku masang jarum pentulnya sejajar sama jahitan, bukan melintang, jadi melenceng deh. Mungkin aku bakal bikin ulang visornya kalau pengin agak lebih lebar.
#millinery

Delapan panel crown dan dua panel visor disatukan jadi tiga bagian terus dipentul biar kelihatan bentuk umumnya. Pakai pola Newsboy Cap dari Sachi's Studio dengan bahan beludru hijau. Sebagian besar dijahit pakai mesin.
Di polanya disuruh jahit tindas (topstitch) di sepanjang jahitan panel crown, yang berarti bisa pakai warna benang yang senada atau kontras.
#millinery

Tampilan dari atas sebelum aku menjahit kedua bagian crown jadi satu. Sambil nonton ulang video panduannya. Aku lihat Sachi pakai beberapa klip jemuran kecil pas menjahit daripada membelah jahitan pakai jarum pentul sepanjang jahitan.

Sambungan delapan panel di bagian puncak topi pet ini agak berantakan, jadi kayaknya butuh kancing yang agak besar buat nutupin jahitannya.

Crown sudah menyatu sepenuhnya, lengkap dengan kancing bungkus di puncaknya. Pinggiran kain yang kasar diselipin asal aja ke bawah. Jahitannya belum disetrika ataupun dijahit tindas.
#millinery

Delapan panel crown dan dua panel visor disatukan jadi tiga bagian terus dipentulin biar kelihatan bentuk kasarnya. Pakai pola Newsboy Cap dari Sachi's Studio dengan bahan beludru hijau. Sebagian besar dijahit pakai mesin.
Di polanya disuruh jahit tindas di sepanjang sambungan panel crown, yang berarti bisa pakai warna benang yang senada atau kontras.
#millinery

Tampilan dari atas sebelum aku ngejahit kedua bagian crown jadi satu. Sambil nonton ulang video panduannya. Aku lihat Sachi pakai beberapa klip jepit kecil pas ngejahit, alih-alih masang jarum pentul di sepanjang jahitan.

Sambungan delapan panel di bagian puncak topi pet ini agak berantakan, jadi kayaknya butuh kancing yang agak besar buat nutupin jahitannya.

Crown udah menyatu sepenuhnya, lengkap dengan kancing bungkus di puncaknya. Pinggiran kain yang berserabut diselipin asal aja ke bawah. Jahitannya belum disetrika ataupun dijahit tindas.
#millinery

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

hypo_0:
Gue harap alkohol tuh gak dianggap sebagai hadiah yang lumrah banget di masyarakat 😅 Bos gue ngirimin sebotol eggnog, padahal satu-satunya "alkohol" yang kita suka tuh cuma ada di spidol alkohol

Kayaknya "gak suka" itu agak kurang pas sih bahasanya, gue cuma ngerasa aneh aja kenapa kita sesantai itu sama barang ginian dan entah gimana kita langsung berasumsi kalau semua orang dewasa doyan ginian, padahal ada orang-orang yang gak boleh nyentuh itu sama sekali, dan jujur gue rasa dunia bakal lebih baik kalau gue buang aja itu ke toilet daripada dihadiahin ke orang lain

@doombloomart
Gue pernah ikut pelatihan sensitivitas wajib dari Perusahaan Besar AS yang ngingetin orang-orang kalau gak semua orang pengen alkohol dan nanya alasannya itu gak sopan. Kayaknya hal kayak gitu harusnya lebih umum deh

@elithebearded Iya, itu juga sebagian besar yang gue harapin. Gue paham sih ngirim barang random ke seluruh perusahaan itu gak bakal bisa nyenengin semua orang, tapi 1. mending gak usah ngirim barang random ke seluruh perusahaan dan 2. alkohol tuh bikin gue risi aja karena banyak orang yang gak boleh nyentuh barang itu malah mungkin bakal nyentuh pas tiba-tiba muncul di depan pintu rumah. 😅
