source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

Campanīle
Sebuah utas #puisi
i.
Menara lonceng gereja Romawi,
salib emas menggapai awan:
lonceng berdentang, bebaskan nada kuningan,
bernyanyi menembus kabut tebal,
pekingan tingginya sebuah seruan
kepada umat beriman yang tlah lama tiada.
Tak ada lagi semangat kesalehan:
banyak fajar yang tlah tenggelam.
Menara batunya tetap berjaga
di balik topeng hujan senja,
langit menumpahkan serangannya
ke atas genting atap lagi.
🧵👇🏼
#puisi #puisiharian #sendu #neoklasik #gereja #malam #fotografi

ii.
Siapa yang menarik tali lonceng?
Biarawan sunyi di biaranya
tanpa ada seorang pun yang sepaham.
Dia, butiran pasir dalam tiram gereja —
namun tak ada sel tempat tidurnya,
tak ada debu yang terusik oleh sepatunya,
namanya tak pernah diucapkan,
tak ada buku tua yang dipakainya.
Tali lonceng itu menggantung, usang, berserabut,
digerogoti gigi tikus gereja.
Sudah lama sejak ia berayun,
ditarik oleh tangan di bawahnya.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Angin malam membisikkan mazmur
dan mengembuskan nyanyian kidung
untuk mengayunkan pemukul perunggu,
aku menyahut dalam deskan —
tapi bukan dengan suaraku sendiri.
Angin menelan seruanku,
mendentangkan bunyi kudusnya sendiri
dengan tangan badainya.
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.

hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs setidaknya di lingkaran pertemananku hp udah lumrah dari awal tahun 90-an, tapi biayanya *mahal banget* kalau ditelepon dari telepon rumah (jadi kalau kamu masih tinggal bareng orang tua, pasti bakal dilarang), dan sampai tahun 1995-1999 sistemnya belum aman, siapa pun yang punya pemindai radio bisa (dan sering banget) nyadap teleponnya.
Meskipun pemindai radio itu di luar jangkauan kantong anak muda, banyak orang tua yang punya, dan sampai akhir tahun 90-an mereka itu sering kali tipe penggemar radio yang jadi penjilat tory dan ngedukung polisi serta organisasi kemapanan lainnya, jadi kalau kamu ngebahas hal-hal yang berbau subversif di hp, kamu berisiko dilaporkan...
Ironisnya keadaan berbalik di akhir tahun 90-an waktu pemindai radio mulai terjangkau, dan polisi masih pakai radio analog 😁

@JugglingWithEggs pas akhir 1990-an semua orang udah punya hp dan biaya telepon lebih murah (sering kali dapet banyak bonus menit gratis) tapi SMS sering eror dan awalnya malah gak bisa dikirim ke operator lain - orang-orang beneran teleponan buat ngobrol!
Salah satu bedanya dulu itu akses ke ruang publik gak dijaga ketat kayak sekarang - meskipun udah ada CCTV dan warga sekitar bakal ngelaporin polisi kalau ada anak muda yang "nongkrong-nongkrong", personel di lapangan gak cukup dan CCTV-nya juga belum saling terhubung (satpam beneran harus mantau rekaman langsung di tempat, dan pemilik properti biasanya gak mau bayar orang-orang ini pas malam hari dan akhir pekan).
Polisi yang bertugas di pinggiran kota juga lebih sedikit pas malam/akhir pekan - mereka semua dikerahkan ke pusat kota)

@vfrmedia
Aku inget dulu pas awal tahun 2000-an SMS kadang butuh waktu berjam-jam buat masuk - jadi gak selalu bisa diandalin buat bikin janji mendadak.
Tinggal di kota kecil emang beneran minim CCTV dan polisi pas tahun 90-an dulu. Inget banget bedanya pas lagi main ke Bournemouth atau Norwich pas malam hari. Tapi anak muda yang lagi seneng-seneng gak terlalu dipandang sinis kayak sekarang. Postingan pertamaku tentang pengenalan wajah itu tentang daerah yang lagi banyak banget remaja nongkrong.

Meskipun pemindai radio itu di luar jangkauan kantong anak muda, banyak orang tua yang punya, dan sampai akhir tahun 90-an mereka itu sering kali tipe penggemar radio yang jadi penjilat Tory dan ngedukung polisi serta organisasi kemapanan lainnya, jadi kalau kamu ngebahas hal-hal yang berbau subversif di hp, kamu berisiko diadukan...
Ironisnya keadaan berbalik di akhir tahun 90-an waktu pemindai radio mulai murah, dan polisi masih pakai radio analog 😁

@JugglingWithEggs pas akhir 1990-an semua orang udah punya hp dan biaya telepon lebih murah (sering kali dapet banyak bonus menit gratis) tapi SMS sering eror dan awalnya malah gak bisa dikirim lintas operator - orang-orang beneran teleponan buat ngobrol!
Salah satu bedanya dulu itu akses ke ruang publik gak dijaga ketat kayak sekarang - meskipun udah ada CCTV dan warga sekitar bakal ngelaporin polisi kalau ada anak muda yang "nongkrong-nongkrong", personel di lapangan gak cukup dan CCTV-nya juga belum saling terhubung (satpam beneran harus mantau rekaman langsung di lokasi, dan pemilik properti biasanya gak mau bayar orang-orang ini pas malam hari dan akhir pekan).
Polisi yang bertugas di pinggiran kota juga lebih sedikit pas malam/akhir pekan - mereka semua dikerahkan ke pusat kota)

This place is too small.
It cramps her spirit.
Okay, I'll think about it, I promise.

What?

That's 150 Grand Avenue.
We're looking for 141.
I like all these houses.

That personality hasn't changed and can't change because that's the world of the show.
There's two of you.
There's Mr. Pickles, and then there's Jeff.
And never the two should meet in order to prevent the destruction of them both.
When he's subjected to a personal tragedy, he has to go back to work the next day and still be the same person.
Hey there.
Thump, thump.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

hypo_0:
Di luar dugaan, mirip plot twist ala Inspektur Clouseau, sekarang aku punya hal tambahan buat diselidiki untuk Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Pas lagi nge-scroll cepat video kamera sekunder malam ini, aku ngelihat si Inspektur yang penasaran lagi berdiri di batang pohon dekat tempat makan. Dia loncat-loncat terus, nemuin dia di dekat tempat para murai tadi berada, jadi awalnya aku curiga dia cuma lagi ngejar mereka kayak yang kadang mereka biarin dia lakuin, sampai aku gak sengaja berhenti...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Si Inspektur Clouseau ada di sana, guling-guling kayak orang gila sekitar 2 meter di timur laut pohon, sebagian besar ketutupan gara-gara posisi tiang timur tenda yang gak pas. Tapi tetap aja, dia ada di sana selama 5 menit, terus dia lari balik ke atas pohon, jalan ngelewati halaman rumput ke arah bukit, tiarap di bagian bawah, lalu lari keluar dari jangkauan kamera, kayaknya lagi kena Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Nah, kayak yang mungkin udah diketahui sama sebagian pembaca Spooky Kitties Sciences, motivasi di balik tes itu bukan cuma buat ngehibur para kucing. Meskipun aspek paling pentingnya adalah rasa penasaran beneranku pas ngelihat kucing-kucing itu guling-guling di salju, aku pengen banget nemuin sesuatu yang disukai si Inspektur. Dari tes awal kemarin, aku cuma dapat satu momen singkat yang ngasih petunjuk kalau dia menyukai sesuatu. Apa itu, masih jadi misteri.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences
hypo_1:
Di luar dugaan, mirip plot twist ala Inspektur Clouseau, sekarang aku punya satu hal lagi buat diselidiki untuk Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Pas lagi nge-scroll cepat rekaman kamera sekunder malam ini, aku ngelihat si Inspektur yang penasaran lagi berdiri di batang pohon deket tempat makan. Dia loncat-loncat terus, nemuin dia di deket tempat para burung murai tadinya berada, jadi awalnya aku curiga (edit) dia cuma lagi ngejar mereka kayak yang kadang mereka biarin, sampai akhirnya aku gak sengaja berhenti...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Si Inspektur Clouseau ada di sana, guling-guling kayak orang gila sekitar 2 meter di timur laut pohon, sebagian besar ketutupan gara-gara posisi tiang timur kanopi yang kurang pas. Tapi tetep aja, dia ada di sana selama 5 menit, terus dia lari balik ke atas pohon, jalan ngelewati halaman rumput ke arah bukit, tiarap di bagian bawah, lalu lari keluar dari jangkauan kamera, kayaknya lagi kena Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Nah, kayak yang mungkin udah diketahui sama sebagian pembaca Spooky Kitties Sciences, motivasi di balik tes itu bukan cuma buat ngehibur para kucing. Meskipun aspek paling pentingnya adalah rasa penasaran beneranku pas ngelihat kucing-kucing itu guling-guling di salju, aku pengen banget nemuin sesuatu yang disukai si Inspektur. Dari tes awal kemarin, aku cuma dapet satu momen singkat yang ngasih petunjuk kalau dia menyukai sesuatu. Apa itu, masih misteri.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social jaaadi, sekarang kita nandain konten manusia asli biar mereka punya dataset yang minim sampah buat bahan latihan?
Tau ah, biarin aja mereka mampus tenggelam dalam lautan sampah bikinan mereka sendiri sampai ruang vektor laten mereka menyatu.

Pretty much.
This whole thing is one big crater.

Slow down.
Yeah.
Like that.
Good, good.
Stop, stop.
Okay.

source_doc:
The fried eggs have turned to scrambled eggs.
You know what?
Considering we didn't have a spatula, it's not horrible.
Yum.
Alrighty.
It's breakfast time.
It is 904 and we're still at 100%.
To be fair, we didn't really do anything with the phone just yet.
It was just mostly sitting there in my pocket.
Also, yes, I do put the the milk in first because this way the cereal doesn't get soggy.
Unfortunately, it seems my opinion is a rather unpopular one.

source_doc:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble is dire at Trust and Safety
Care to expand on that or link me?
> Whitney (Bumble) [is] a billionaire anyway, so what does she care?
I presume she didn't found Bumble by herself, maybe wasn't even part of the original group (as with Melon Husk and Tesla). What about the rest of them?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

Gue rasa dia nggak mendirikan Bumble sendirian, bahkan mungkin bukan bagian dari grup awal (kayak Melon Husk dan Tesla). Gimana dengan yang lainnya?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> Gue rasa masih ada ruang buat balik ke model lama
Ada banyak model baru yang bisa dicoba yang bakal jadi peningkatan besar dibanding main roulette tagar, baik di DataFarms atau jejaring sosial terdesentralisasi. Salah satu ide yang gue lihat adalah kencan online sebagai pengalaman sosial berbasis grup. Ini langkah awal ke arah yang benar. Begitu juga ide @cy tentang biro jodoh di cabang utas lain ini.

(3/?)
Ngomong-ngomong soal roulette, gimana kalau aplikasi kencan kilat ala Chat Roulette?
Aplikasi ini bisa;
* melakukan pemeriksaan dasar Keamanan & Kepercayaan (buat meminimalkan foto alat kelamin yang nggak diminta, dll), termasuk mengonfirmasi wilayah umum lo (tanya gue gimana caranya!)
* mempertemukan lo dalam putaran kencan kilat waktu nyata dengan orang lain di wilayah lo (teks? Suara? Video? lihat 4/4).
* Sama kayak kencan kilat biasa, kalau kalian berdua saling memfavoritkan setelah ngobrol, kalian bakal dapet kontak masing-masing
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, industri ini nggak bener-bener dipenuhi sama pembocor rahasia situs kencan, tapi para pekerja keamanan di industri ini emang suka ngobrol sama gue. Gue tahu lebih banyak dari yang pengen gue tahu tentang cara kerja bagian dalam sebagian besar situs kencan, dan sayangnya, bukan hal yang mengejutkan kalau Bumble sama buruknya dengan yang lain.
Nggak ada satu pun situs kencan yang bener-bener niat dalam hal Keamanan & Kepercayaan. Mereka membandingkan biaya litigasi dengan biaya untuk bener-bener ngelakuin pekerjaan itu, dan sejauh ini, biaya litigasi selalu lebih murah.

@lorry
> industri ini nggak bener-bener dipenuhi sama pembocor rahasia situs kencan

source_doc:
Aren't you going to say goodbye to me?
How did you know I was going?
I knew it this afternoon.
The way you faced up to him.
Well, I would have told him then.
Except for you.
I thought it would be best if I slipped out this way.
Are you sure you're doing the right thing?
There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

Sorry if I sound strange, but really, Mr. Powell, that man is kind of frightening.
Frightening?
Well, he just sits there and grins at me.
I told him he didn't see people without an appointment.
He said, oh, he'll see me.
Just tell him it's an old friend.
Clint, do you know anybody by that name?
Clint.
Clint.
No, it doesn't ring a bell.
All right, send him in.
I'll get rid of him.
Okay.
Don't say I didn't warn you.
Mr. Powell will see you.

Aku bukan orang yang menarik.

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

- cara kerja jembatan penghubung (bridge)
- cara pakainya
- tolong pakai dong karena gue mau follow lo dan nge-reblog beberapa karya lo yang gue suka
- kalau nggak mau juga nggak apa-apa
dan mereka balas "nggak mau" yang mana ya bebas-bebas aja sih, tapi abis itu mereka nge-block gue???
kayak, bener-bener tanpa alasan yang jelas banget

gue nggak bakal sebut nama karena gue SAMA SEKALI GAK benci sama siapa pun yang terlibat dan gue pastinya nggak mau memicu aksi serang-menyerang, tapi ini udah kejadian sama beberapa orang sekarang, termasuk orang-orang yang udah NGE-REBLOG DAN LIKE POSTINGAN YANG DI-BRIDGE DARI AKUN INI (akun utama gue), makanya GUE MAU FOLLOW MEREKA

kalau mereka cuma bilang "nggak deh, makasih" mereka bakal dapet balasan "oke, paham banget kok! :)" atau sejenisnya dari gue, tapi sekarang semua orang malah harus dengerin omelan bingung gue ini. gue bahkan nggak marah, gue cuma *bener-bener heran aja*

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Gue lagi ada meeting mingguan selama 1 jam bareng direktur engineering buat sharing opini gue tentang mengelola organisasi manajemen produk, dan ternyata ini seru banget kayak serial mingguan yang menarik

Topik-topik yang dibahas yaitu
- berbagai tipe product manager dan keahlian dasar dalam menyusun requirement
- cara product manager memastikan ritme kerja tim engineering tetap berjalan lancar
- menghadapi product manager dengan latar belakang yang beda-beda (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, konsultasi, dll.)
yang bikin seru adalah gue sama Direktur ini dulu pernah kerja di perusahaan yang sama dengan product manager yang bukan bawahan gue, dan gue bisa bilang "eh inget orang itu gak? dia keren banget dan ini alasannya."

jadi di berbagai utas email dan obrolan Slack, gue bakal terusin pesannya ke direktur tersebut (kalau dia belum ada di sana) dan bilang "oke, product manager yang BAGUS bakal ngelakuin INI" dan "product manager yang BURUK bakal ngelakuin ITU" inget gak pas si ini ngelakuin INI? nah itu bagus.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

Pagi Dunia!
Pagi ini kami mau ke tempat pembuangan sampah. Ini bakal ngurangin beberapa barang di jalan masuk rumah yang kemarin udah kami pilah. Kayaknya gak bakal bersih semua sih kalau gak bawa trailer, tapi trailernya lagi penuh besi buat ditimbang.
Nanti mungkin aku bakal lanjut ngepak kotak kontainer.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Urusan buang sampah beres, dan satu muatan mobil lagi udah bersih.
Aku udah ngeluarin poros trailer baru, sama sistem motor penggerak trailer, dari muatan rongsokan besi di trailer. Berarti kita bisa masukin lebih banyak rongsokan besi ke situ dan juga gak sengaja nimbang suku cadang yang mau aku simpan.
Kayaknya, abis ini, aku bakal mulai mindahin rongsokan besi dari kebun belakang ke trailer biar siap dibawa.
Harga rongsokan besi lagi gak terlalu bagus saat ini, tapi lumayanlah daripada gak sama sekali, kalau aku bawa banyak sekaligus.
Masih harus milah rongsokan non-besi juga.

Momen pas kamu lagi ngelepas ban yang udah busuk dari roda traktor rumput yang kecil dan lebar....
Perlu usaha keras banget buat ngelepas satu sisi ban, tapi sisi satunya lagi bener-bener karatan parah dan nempel kencang di pelek.
Saking lamanya aku nyoba ngelepas pinggiran ban itu, aku sampai lupa kalau sisi satunya udah lepas, dan akhirnya peleknya lepas tapi malah masuk sepenuhnya ke dalem ban!
Aku harus masang bannya lagi di sisi itu, terus nyari cara buat ngeluarin peleknya.
Aku juga harus motong ban dalemnya biar bisa keluar!
Kira-kira berapa ban lagi ya yang harus aku lepas? Sejauh ini udah beres empat.

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```

hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Siapkan dan kelola Toko Facebook langsung dari dasbor Mambalo Anda. Lupakan berbagi di media sosial. Anda kini siap untuk berjualan di media sosial.",
  "Tambahkan, promosikan, dan jual produk dengan mudah, atau kelola semua iklan Facebook Anda hanya dalam beberapa klik — langsung dari dasbor Mambalo Anda.",
  "Ubah calon pembeli yang sekadar melihat-lihat menjadi pelanggan berbayar dengan pemasaran ulang Facebook. Hanya dengan beberapa klik, kami akan membuat iklan yang sangat tertarget untuk mengingatkan pelanggan Anda tentang produk yang sempat mereka pertimbangkan tetapi tidak jadi dibeli.",
  "Jual ke mana saja",
  "Siapkan dan kelola toko Facebook langsung dari dasbor Mambalo Anda. Lupakan berbagi di media sosial. Anda kini siap untuk berjualan di media sosial.",
  "Khawatir dengan pengelolaan ekstra? Mambalo menyinkronkan informasi produk dari toko online Anda dengan Facebook secara otomatis, sehingga setiap perubahan yang Anda buat akan langsung muncul di toko e-commerce Facebook Anda. Lakukan sekali saja dan lupakan selebihnya.",
  "Mengiklankan toko Facebook Anda — kini jadi mudah",
  "Piksel Facebook membuat iklan di Facebook jauh lebih efektif. Pasarkan dengan mudah kepada audiens ideal Anda berdasarkan tindakan yang mereka lakukan di toko online Anda dan lacak konversi mereka. Anda tidak hanya tahu persis kepada siapa Anda beriklan, tetapi Anda juga memiliki pemahaman yang lebih baik tentang performa iklan Anda. Secara keseluruhan, Anda dapat membuat pesan Anda lebih kuat, sehingga menghasilkan laba atas investasi iklan yang lebih baik.",
  "Pemasaran ulang. Kepada semua orang yang mengunjungi situs Anda, atau hanya kepada orang-orang yang mengunjungi halaman tertentu atau melakukan tindakan tertentu.",
  "Pengiriman dan pajak yang efisien: Terintegrasi dengan kurir utama seperti USPS, UPS, FedEx, dan banyak kurir internasional lainnya untuk menghitung tarif pengiriman secara otomatis.",
  "Kemampuan E-commerce WordPress: Tambahkan toko online Anda ke WordPress dan tampilkan produk, harga, dan deskripsi yang sama di toko Facebook Anda seperti di etalase WordPress Anda atau pembuat situs lainnya seperti Weebly, Wix, dan Adobe Muse.",
  "Aplikasi seluler e-commerce: Dengan aplikasi iOS dan Android gratis dari Mambalo, Anda dapat mengelola penjualan, melacak inventaris, dan menerima pembayaran online di mana pun Anda berada.",
  "Layanan tervalidasi PCI DSS tingkat 1: Menyediakan 55+ opsi pembayaran dan kemampuan checkout HTTPS yang aman untuk memastikan Anda mematuhi persyaratan PCI DSS Tingkat 1.",
  "Apakah mungkin untuk memigrasikan toko saya dari WooCommerce ke Facebook dengan Mambalo?",
  "Saya masih bingung dan butuh bantuan ekstra dengan aplikasi perdagangan Facebook Mambalo. Apa yang harus saya lakukan?",
  "Jangan lupakan juga Basis Pengetahuan kami. Jika Anda ingin mempelajari dasar-dasar Mambalo, cara mengelola toko Facebook Mambalo Anda, dan topik aplikasi perdagangan Facebook Mambalo lainnya, Basis Pengetahuan kami dapat menjadi sumber daya yang sangat berguna.",
  "Tim Mambalo juga dengan senang hati akan membantu Anda. Jangan ragu untuk mengirim pesan kepada kami kapan saja, dan kami akan merespons secepat mungkin.",
  "Belanja Pintar Google membawa produk Anda melampaui pencarian Google untuk membantu Anda beriklan di Google Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, dan Jaringan Google Display.",
  "Maksimalkan penjualan tanpa menebak-nebak"
]
```

  "Kemampuan E-commerce WordPress: Tambahkan toko online Anda ke WordPress dan tampilkan produk, harga, serta deskripsi yang sama di toko Facebook Anda seperti halnya di etalase WordPress Anda atau pembuat situs lainnya seperti Weebly, Wix, dan Adobe Muse.",
  "Aplikasi seluler e-commerce: Dengan aplikasi iOS dan Android gratis dari Mambalo, Anda dapat mengelola penjualan, memantau inventaris, dan menerima pembayaran online di mana pun Anda berada.",
  "Layanan tervalidasi PCI DSS Tingkat 1: Menyediakan lebih dari 55 pilihan pembayaran dan fitur checkout HTTPS yang aman untuk memastikan Anda mematuhi persyaratan PCI DSS Tingkat 1.",
  "Apakah mungkin untuk memigrasikan toko saya dari WooCommerce ke Facebook menggunakan Mambalo?",
  "Saya masih bingung dan butuh bantuan lebih lanjut tentang aplikasi perdagangan Facebook Mambalo. Apa yang harus saya lakukan?",
  "Jangan lupakan juga Basis Pengetahuan kami. Jika Anda ingin mempelajari dasar-dasar Mambalo, cara mengelola toko Facebook Mambalo Anda, serta topik aplikasi perdagangan Facebook Mambalo lainnya, Basis Pengetahuan kami dapat menjadi sumber informasi yang sangat berguna.",
  "Tim Mambalo juga dengan senang hati membantu Anda. Jangan ragu untuk mengirim pesan kepada kami kapan saja, dan kami akan merespons secepat mungkin.",
  "Google Smart Shopping menampilkan produk Anda melampaui hasil pencarian Google biasa untuk membantu Anda beriklan di Google Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, dan Jaringan Google Display.",
  "Maksimalkan penjualan tanpa perlu menebak-nebak"
]

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Tuan rumah memimpin pada menit ke-26 melalui Diaz yang produktif saat pemain Real Madrid tersebut menunjukkan naluri mencetaknya golnya.

Sepak pojok Achraf Hakimi disundul ke arah gawang oleh Ayoub El Kaabi dan Diaz membelokkan bola masuk dari jarak dekat.

Ia kini telah mencetak gol dalam masing-masing dari lima pertandingan Maroko dan memperpanjang rekor pribadinya untuk gol terbanyak oleh seorang pemain Maroko di satu putaran final Piala Afrika, tetapi ia meninggalkan lapangan di menit-menit akhir dengan paha yang dibalut perban tebal yang akan menjadi kekhawatiran bagi pelatih Walid Regragui.

Peluang sulit didapat oleh kedua tim, tetapi sundulan Abde Ezzalzouli menyamping tipis di atas mistar gawang dari sepak pojok Hakimi lainnya, sementara nama terakhir memberikan umpan sundulan untuk Saibari yang gagal dimaksimalkan.

Kamerun tidak beruntung karena tidak mendapatkan penalti ketika Mbeumo dilanggar di kotak penalti saat wasit Mauritania Dahane Beida mengabaikannya, sementara Georges-Kevin Nkoudou menyundul bola yang melebar di tiang jauh yang menjadi peluang terbaik Indomitable Lions dalam pertandingan tersebut.

Maroko menjadikannya 2-0 beberapa menit kemudian untuk menyudahi perlawanan saat Saibari berdiri tanpa kawalan di tiang jauh dan memiliki waktu untuk mengontrol bola lalu melepaskan tembakan rendah ke sudut jauh gawang.

Ismael Saibari memberikan ruang bernapas bagi Maroko saat melawan Kamerun (REUTERS)

Dalam perempat final lainnya pada hari Jumat, Iliman Ndiaye mencetak satu-satunya gol saat Senegal memesan tempat di semifinal Afcon untuk ketiga kalinya dalam empat turnamen terakhir, dengan mengalahkan 10 pemain Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye mencetak gol setelah 27 menit, memanfaatkan blunder penjaga gawang untuk membawa Senegal unggul dalam derbi yang menegangkan melawan tetangga mereka di Afrika Barat.

Mali harus bermain dengan 10 orang di babak kedua setelah kapten Yves Bissouma diusir keluar lapangan karena menerima kartu kuning kedua menjelang turun minum.

Ia mendapat kartu kuning pertama karena pelanggaran keras pada menit ke-25 dan diusir keluar lapangan setelah pelanggaran yang tidak perlu terhadap Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali bermain dengan 10 orang sejak menit ke-26 dalam laga sebelumnya melawan Tunisia dan masih berhasil lolos lewat adu penalti, tetapi kali ini tidak ada kebangkitan saat menghadapi tim Senegal yang tangguh.
hypo_1:
Tuan rumah memimpin pada menit ke-26 lewat gol dari Diaz yang produktif, seiring pemain Real Madrid tersebut menunjukkan naluri mencetak golnya.

Umpan sepak pojok Achraf Hakimi disundul ke arah gawang oleh Ayoub El Kaabi dan Diaz membelokkan bola masuk dari jarak dekat.

Ia kini selalu mencetak gol dalam masing-masing dari lima pertandingan Maroko dan memperpanjang rekornya sendiri sebagai pencetak gol terbanyak dari Maroko di satu putaran final Piala Afrika, tetapi ia harus meninggalkan lapangan menjelang laga usai dengan paha dibalut perban tebal yang tentu mengkhawatirkan bagi pelatih Walid Regragui.

Peluang sulit didapat oleh kedua tim, tetapi sundulan Abde Ezzalzouli melambung tipis di atas mistar gawang dari sepak pojok Hakimi lainnya, sementara nama terakhir memberikan umpan sundulan kepada Saibari yang gagal dimaksimalkan.

Kamerun kurang beruntung karena tidak mendapatkan hadiah penalti saat Mbeumo dilanggar di kotak terlarang, lantaran wasit asal Mauritania Dahane Beida memutuskan untuk melanjutkan pertandingan, sementara sundulan Georges-Kevin Nkoudou di tiang jauh yang menjadi peluang terbaik Indomitable Lions masih melebar.

Maroko memperbesar keunggulan menjadi 2-0 beberapa menit kemudian untuk menyudahi perlawanan saat Saibari berdiri tanpa kawalan di tiang jauh dan memiliki waktu untuk mengontrol bola sebelum melepaskan tembakan mendatar ke sudut jauh gawang.

Ismael Saibari memberikan ruang bernapas bagi Maroko saat menghadapi Kamerun (REUTERS)

Dalam laga perempat final lainnya pada hari Jumat, Iliman Ndiaye mencetak satu-satunya gol saat Senegal mengamankan tiket semifinal Piala Afrika untuk ketiga kalinya dalam empat turnamen terakhir dengan mengalahkan 10 pemain Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye membobol gawang lawan pada menit ke-27, memanfaatkan kesalahan fatal penjaga gawang untuk membawa Senegal unggul dalam laga derbi yang sengit melawan tetangga mereka di Afrika Barat.

Mali harus bermain dengan 10 orang di babak kedua setelah kapten Yves Bissouma diusir keluar lapangan akibat menerima kartu kuning kedua menjelang turun minum.

Ia menerima kartu kuning pertama karena pelanggaran keras pada menit ke-25 dan dikeluarkan dari lapangan setelah melakukan pelanggaran yang tidak perlu terhadap Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali sempat bermain dengan 10 orang sejak menit ke-26 dalam laga sebelumnya melawan Tunisia dan masih mampu lolos lewat adu penalti, tetapi kali ini mereka tidak bisa bangkit saat menghadapi skuad Senegal yang solid.

Mali harus bermain dengan 10 orang di babak kedua setelah kapten Yves Bissouma diusir keluar lapangan akibat menerima kartu kuning kedua menjelang turun minum.

Ia menerima kartu kuning pertama karena pelanggaran keras pada menit ke-25 dan dikeluarkan dari lapangan setelah melakukan pelanggaran yang tidak perlu terhadap Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali sempat bermain dengan 10 orang sejak menit ke-26 dalam laga sebelumnya melawan Tunisia dan masih mampu lolos lewat adu penalti, namun kali ini mereka tidak bisa bangkit saat menghadapi skuad Senegal yang tampil apik.
hypo_4:
Tuan rumah memimpin pada menit ke-26 melalui pemain produktif Diaz, saat penggawa Real Madrid tersebut menunjukkan naluri tajamnya dalam mencetak gol.

Sepak pojok Achraf Hakimi disundul ke arah gawang oleh Ayoub El Kaabi dan Diaz membelokkan bola masuk dari jarak dekat.

Ia kini selalu mencetak gol dalam setiap dari lima pertandingan Maroko dan memperpanjang rekornya sendiri sebagai pencetak gol terbanyak oleh pemain Maroko di satu putaran final Piala Afrika, namun harus meninggalkan lapangan menjelang laga usai dengan paha dibalut perban tebal yang akan menjadi kekhawatiran bagi pelatih Walid Regragui.

Peluang sulit didapat oleh kedua tim, namun sundulan Abde Ezzalzouli melambung tipis di atas mistar gawang memanfaatkan sepak pojok Hakimi lainnya, sementara nama terakhir memberikan umpan sundulan kepada Saibari yang gagal dikonversi menjadi gol.

Kamerun tidak beruntung karena tidak mendapatkan hadiah penalti saat Mbeumo dilanggar di kotak penalti, lantaran wasit asal Mauritania Dahane Beida memutuskan untuk melanjutkan pertandingan, sementara sundulan Georges-Kevin Nkoudou di tiang jauh yang menjadi peluang terbaik Indomitable Lions masih melebar.

Maroko menggandakan keunggulan menjadi 2-0 beberapa menit kemudian untuk mengunci kemenangan ketika Saibari berdiri tanpa kawalan di tiang jauh dan memiliki waktu untuk mengontrol bola sebelum melepaskan tembakan mendatar ke sudut jauh gawang.

I'm so glad you're here.
Nothing better than sharing Christmas with friends and family.
I thought we could do the decorating together.
Is this the Earl of Shannon?
Indeed.
He's in the study.
Shall we?
Darling?
It's Isabella Caldwell and her lovely granddaughter.
Oh, won't she make someone a wonderful wife?

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Bro, demi Dia-Yang-Namanya-Tidak-Boleh-Sebut, yang lo maksud itu akibat dari _misogini_, bukan "misandri".

Gue butuh banget para cowok sadar kalau cuma karena hal itu ditujukan ke mereka dan emang masalah serius, bukan berarti itu "misandri".
Baru aja ngeliat ada yang nyebut diskriminasi _karena dianggap feminin_ sebagai "misandri" dan gue bener-bener gak habis pikir.

Bukannya lo gak ngalamin hal yang nyata. Bisa jadi emang iya. Tapi itu bukan "misandri". Karena "misandri" itu gak ada.
Ya, ini berlaku buat trans cowok juga. "Transmisandri" itu _juga_ gak nyata dan cuma mendukung narasi anti-feminis. Hal itu seolah-olah kayak cerminan dari transmisogini, padahal transmisogini itu _interseksional_: kita ngalamin transfobia _dan_ kita ngalamin misogini _dan_ kita ngalamin hal mengerikan yang terjadi pas keduanya saling berkaitan. Ini bukan bagian kecil, bahkan bukan bagian kecil yang eksklusif, ini adalah titik temu.
Tapi hal-hal di bawah ini emang bener-bener masalah yang bisa dibahas!
* Transfobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskulinitas
* Transemasculation
* Misogini
Emang gak enak rasanya didiskriminasi, tapi bahasa yang kita pake itu penting banget di sini.

Gue butuh banget para cowok sadar kalau cuma karena hal itu ditujukan ke mereka dan emang masalah serius, bukan berarti itu "misandri".
Baru aja ngeliat ada yang nyebut diskriminasi _karena dianggap kemayu_ sebagai "misandri" dan gue bener-bener... ah sudahlah.

Bukannya lo gak ngalamin hal yang nyata. Bisa jadi emang iya. Tapi itu bukan "misandri". Karena "misandri" itu gak ada.
Ya, ini berlaku buat trans cowok juga. "Transmisandri" itu _juga_ gak nyata dan cuma mendukung narasi anti-feminis. Hal itu dianggap seolah-olah kayak cerminan dari transmisogini, padahal transmisogini itu _interseksional_: kita ngalamin transfobia _dan_ kita ngalamin misogini _dan_ kita ngalamin hal mengerikan yang terjadi pas keduanya saling berkaitan. Ini bukan sekadar bagian kecil, bahkan bukan bagian yang eksklusif, ini adalah titik temu.
Tapi hal-hal di bawah ini emang bener-bener masalah yang bisa dibahas!
* Transfobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskulinitas
* Transemasculation
* Misogini
Emang gak enak rasanya didiskriminasi, tapi bahasa yang kita pake itu penting, penting banget di sini.

@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick

@theynege dia meng-screenshot akunnya dan mempostingnya dengan komentar "perempuan bermasker gila", pas ditegur dia LANGSUNG ngehapus postingan itu dan mulai memposting bukti kebaikannya sebagai "pembangun komunitas" dan semua orang yang pernah bekerja sama dengannya dan dan dan wah, bukankah dia luar biasa tanpa mengakui sama sekali kalau dia - si pembangun komunitas dan cowok dengan identitas marjinal dan segalanya - menargetkan seorang perempuan difabel kulit berwarna secara online untuk dilecehkan dengan melakukan hal itu.
Kualitas serangannya itu luar biasa banget buat dilihat. Dia siap memberi tahu semua orang betapa hebatnya dia untuk menutupi serangan yang dia tahu bisa berdampak buruk.

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

👩‍🦱 ~ HAWA & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
seperti yang kalian semua tahu, aku orang yang sangat religius 🛐 jadi..
adegannya: kita lagi di taman eden. adam lagi makan apel dari pohon terlarang, ya iyalah ya. hawa gak mau toleransi tingkah konyolnya lagi, langsung nyamber ular malang yang gak curiga di deketnya, dan siap buat ngehajar adam pakai ular itu. 🐍
#melukis

ngambil sekitar 20 foto dengan pose yang agak beda-beda dll., dan akhirnya milih yang ini. (tangan kanan bakal megang apel)

source_doc:
Oh, yes, now I see.
I think I shall call you Pinocchio, my little pine nut.
Oh, my, my, how late it's gotten.
You see, Pinocchio already your company has become distraction to me.
Well, I really must be off to bed now.
Lots of work to do tomorrow.
There will be much awaiting you as well when the morning sun rises.
Sleep well, my boy.

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ulik-ulik sistem stereo gue minggu ini bikin gue kepikiran soal satu hal aneh yang dari dulu gak pernah gue pahami... coba kita lihat apa warga Mastodon bisa bantu.
Amplinya tipe Philips FA454 dan CD Player-nya Philips CD150.
Menurut buku panduan ampli, gue bisa ngehubungin kedua perangkat ini pakai kabel "DIN 8-pin ke DIN 5-pin + 2 x CINCH kutub tunggal".
Gue nangkepnya ini kabel DIN 8-pin ke DIN 5-pin + kabel RCA stereo... yang kedengarannya aneh banget.
Gak pernah nemu kabel kayak gini. Ada yang bisa bikinin?

Buku panduan servis buat amplinya bagus dan jelas banget (foto ke-2 di postingan atas), tapi gue gak nemu yang sebagus itu buat CD player-nya. Gue lampirin foto (foto ke-4 di postingan atas) dari buku panduan servis yang *kayaknya* bagian yang relevan.
Sekarang sih CD player-nya cuma gue hubungin pakai kabel RCA aja dan semuanya berfungsi normal, tapi kalau gue bisa nemu/bikin kabel DIN ke DIN + RCA yang pas, gue bisa pakai beberapa fungsi tambahan dan ngebebasin satu-satunya input stereo RCA di ampli gue.

Kebetulan ada repair café akhir pekan ini di kota tempat tinggal gue... kalau sampai saat itu gue masih bingung, mungkin bakal gue bawa aja ke sana dan lihat apa mereka bisa bantu gue rakit kabelnya.

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Falkirk perkuat harapan tembus enam besar dengan kemenangan tandang di markas St Mirren

Miller kemudian memastikan raihan poin penuh sesaat setelah laga berjalan satu jam saat ia memanfaatkan pertahanan St Mirren yang pasif untuk mengejar bola muntah dari tembakannya sendiri yang sempat diblok, sebelum akhirnya mencungkil bola melewati George.

Ini menjadi sore yang patut dilupakan bagi St Mirren, yang harus kehilangan Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips, dan George karena cedera saat mereka menelan kekalahan ketiga secara beruntun.

Falkirk mendapat peluang pertama pada menit ke-18 ketika Barney Stewart menyodorkan bola kepada Dylan Tait, yang tembakan melengkungnya dari luar kotak penalti sedikit membentur pemain lawan sebelum akhirnya membentur tiang gawang atas.

St Mirren akhirnya memberikan ancaman sesaat setelah laga berjalan setengah jam ketika Mikael Mandron melepaskan tembakan dari sudut sempit, memaksa penjaga gawang Falkirk, Scott Bain, melakukan penyelamatan gemilang dengan kakinya.

Falkirk kemudian langsung menyerang balik dan Miller yang tampil lincah berhasil lolos serta melepaskan tembakan dari sudut yang sama, namun George berhasil mengamankannya dengan mudah.

Pertandingan akhirnya mulai berjalan hidup dan Dan Nlundulu menjadi pemain berikutnya yang melepaskan tembakan ke gawang pada menit ke-36 setelah para pemain Bairns kehilangan penguasaan bola dengan mudah, namun bola berhasil diamankan dengan rutin di tiang dekat oleh Bain.

Nlundulu kemudian berhasil lolos ke lini pertahanan lawan dan menyarangkan bola ke dalam gawang, meskipun sorak-sorai dari pendukung tuan rumah tidak berlangsung lama karena asisten wasit mengangkat bendera tanda offside yang tampak cukup jelas.

Tuan rumah sudah kehilangan Donnelly akibat cedera di pertengahan babak pertama dan mereka mendapat pukulan beruntun ketika Phillips, yang tampaknya mengalami cedera bahu di babak pertama, ditarik keluar saat turun minum.

Pertandingan ini sangat membutuhkan momen magis dan hal itu tercipta 10 menit memasuki babak kedua melalui Yeats.

Umpan terobosan sempurna dari Tait berhasil membebaskan Miller, dan meskipun George berlari keluar dari sarangnya serta melakukan tekel dengan waktu yang tepat, bola liar jatuh ke arah Yeats yang langsung melepaskan tembakan melengkung sekali sentuh yang menakjubkan ke pojok atas gawang St Mirren yang sudah kosong.

Situasi menjadi semakin manis bagi tim tamu sesaat setelah laga berjalan satu jam saat Bairns menggandakan keunggulan mereka.

Tembakan awal Miller dari tepi kotak penalti sempat diblok oleh Scott Tanser, namun saat pertahanan tuan rumah ragu-ragu, Miller bereaksi paling cepat untuk mengejar bola liar dan mengangkat tembakan kaki kanan melewati George yang mencoba menutup ruang.

St Mirren kembali mendapat pukulan telak sesaat setelahnya karena sang penjaga gawang terpaksa ditarik keluar untuk digantikan oleh Ryan Mullen.

Pergantian pemain yang terpaksa dilakukan serta gol-gol cepat tersebut tampaknya mengguncang tuan rumah dan mereka tidak pernah benar-benar mengancam untuk bangkit, dengan nasib buruk mereka di sore itu digambarkan pada menit ke-89 saat tendangan voli Tanser dari jarak enam yard benar-benar meleset.

Ini menjadi sore yang patut dilupakan bagi St Mirren, yang harus kehilangan Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips, dan George akibat cedera saat mereka menelan kekalahan ketiga secara beruntun.

Falkirk mendapat peluang pertama pada menit ke-18 ketika Barney Stewart menyodorkan bola kepada Dylan Tait, yang tembakan melengkungnya dari luar kotak penalti sedikit membentur pemain lawan sebelum akhirnya menghantam mistar gawang.

St Mirren akhirnya menebar ancaman sesaat setelah laga berjalan setengah jam ketika Mikael Mandron melepaskan tembakan dari sudut sempit, memaksa penjaga gawang Falkirk, Scott Bain, melakukan penyelamatan gemilang dengan kakinya.

Falkirk langsung menyerang balik dan Miller yang tampil lincah berhasil lolos dari pengawalan untuk melepaskan tembakan dari sudut yang sama, namun George dapat mengamankannya dengan mudah.

Pertandingan akhirnya mulai berjalan menarik dan Dan Nlundulu menjadi pemain berikutnya yang mengancam gawang lawan pada menit ke-36 setelah para pemain Bairns kehilangan penguasaan bola dengan mudah, namun bola berhasil diamankan dengan mudah di tiang dekat oleh Bain.

Nlundulu kemudian berhasil lolos ke lini pertahanan lawan dan menyarangkan bola ke dalam gawang, meskipun sorak-sorai pendukung tuan rumah tidak berlangsung lama karena asisten wasit mengangkat bendera tanda offside yang tampak cukup jelas.

Tuan rumah sudah kehilangan Donnelly akibat cedera di pertengahan babak pertama dan mereka mendapat pukulan beruntun ketika Phillips, yang tampaknya mengalami cedera bahu di babak pertama, ditarik keluar saat turun minum.

Pertandingan ini sangat membutuhkan momen magis, dan hal itu tercipta 10 menit memasuki babak kedua melalui Yeats.

Umpan terobosan sempurna dari Tait berhasil membebaskan Miller, dan meskipun George berlari keluar dari sarangnya serta melakukan tekel dengan waktu yang tepat, bola liar jatuh ke arah Yeats yang langsung melepaskan tembakan melengkung sekali sentuh yang menakjubkan ke pojok atas gawang St Mirren yang sudah kosong.

Situasi menjadi semakin manis bagi tim tamu sesaat setelah laga berjalan satu jam saat Bairns menggandakan keunggulan mereka.

Tembakan awal Miller dari tepi kotak penalti sempat diblok oleh Scott Tanser, namun saat pertahanan tuan rumah ragu-ragu, Miller bereaksi paling cepat untuk mengejar bola liar dan mengangkat tembakan kaki kanan melewati George yang mencoba menutup ruang.

St Mirren kembali mendapat pukulan telak sesaat setelahnya karena sang penjaga gawang terpaksa ditarik keluar untuk digantikan oleh Ryan Mullen.

Pergantian pemain yang terpaksa dilakukan serta gol-gol cepat tersebut tampaknya mengguncang tuan rumah dan mereka tidak pernah benar-benar mengancam untuk bangkit, dengan nasib buruk mereka di sore itu digambarkan pada menit ke-89 saat tendangan voli Tanser dari jarak enam yard benar-benar meleset.

A dog who can dance.

No one's claimed him yet.
Yeah, and he's so much fun.
I don't know girls, I don't know.
I don't know, maybe, maybe, maybe we'll talk about it.
And, Joey, if you need me, I'll be at Nick's.
It's opening night.
See you.
Later.
Hey, Barbara.
Let's go take pictures of Joey dancing, okay.
Good idea.

I was not thinking.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
proyek pindahan, estafet libur musim semi
hari 1:
Beresin lemari kamar utama
& isi kardus-kardus di salah satu dinding.
Gua lagi mendata semua barang gua. Milah sebagian kecil buat disimpan. Barang-barang kenangan. Barang praktis buat memulai hidup baru. Di tahap ini gua tahu gua milih lebih banyak dari yang dibutuhin, mungkin lebih banyak dari yang bisa gua bawa; tapi jumlah barang yang gua tinggalin jauh lebih banyak. Keputusan buat nyimpen apa & di mana bakal dibuat setelah pendataan selesai. Sisanya bakal dikasih ke "pemburu barang bekas."
#moverR

Hari 2, istirahat siang, Senin.
Hari ini lebih berat dari kemarin. Gua nemuin jauh lebih banyak barang penuh "kenangan". Tantangannya: memori-memori yang disimpan ini secara fisik jadi beban yang malah ngehambat ketimbang ngebantu masa depan gua secara praktis, TAPI gua merasa utuh pas ngelihat barang-barang itu. Menurut gua, ada anggapan umum yang kuat kalau nyimpen barang kenangan itu hal yang buruk. Padahal gua tahu barang-barang itu punya pengaruh kuat. Tapi ya sudahlah, gua kan seniman. Kenangan yang sayu dan sedih pun berharga buat gua. Gua bakal lanjut kayak kemarin, nyimpen lebih sedikit+

+dari yang gua buang, sambil sadar kalau gua masih nyimpen "kebanyakan". Tahap berikutnya adalah proses pindahan & penyimpanan yang sebenarnya, di mana mungkin bakal ada barang yang dikurangi lagi. Tahap ini adalah penyaringan awal sebelum barang-barang yang disisihkan diserahin ke orang lain yang bakal ngangkut semuanya.
Kategori: cara pindah dari rumah yang udah ditinggali selama 12 tahun & kota asal selama 45 tahun, dengan akar keluarga (& peninggalannya) dari 150 tahun lalu. Akhirnya gua pergi juga, demi nyari budaya yang cocok sama nilai-nilai hidup gua.
#moverR

hypo_6:
proyek pindahan rumah, estafet libur musim semi
hari 1:
Beresin lemari kamar tidur utama
& isi kardus-kardus di salah satu sisi dinding.
Gua lagi mendata semua barang gua. Milah sebagian kecil buat disimpan. Barang-barang penuh kenangan. Barang-barang praktis buat memulai hidup baru. Di tahap ini gua tahu gua milih lebih banyak dari yang gua butuhin, mungkin lebih banyak dari yang bisa gua bawa; tapi jumlah barang yang gua tinggalin jauh lebih banyak. Keputusan buat nyimpen apa & ditaruh di mana bakal dibuat setelah proses milih-milih ini selesai. Sisanya bakal dikasih ke "pemulung."
#moverR

Hari 2, istirahat siang, Senin.
Hari ini lebih berat dari kemarin. Gua nemuin jauh lebih banyak barang penuh "kenangan". Tantangannya: kenangan-kenangan yang disimpan ini jadi beban fisik yang malah ngehambat ketimbang ngebantu masa depan gua secara praktis, DAN gua ngerasa utuh pas ngelihat barang-barang itu. Menurut gua, ada anggapan umum yang kuat kalau nyimpen barang kenangan itu gak baik. Padahal gua tahu barang-barang itu punya arti yang kuat. Tapi ya sudahlah, gua kan seniman. Kenangan yang melankolis dan sedih pun berharga buat gua. Gua bakal lanjut kayak kemarin, nyimpen lebih sedikit+

+dari yang gua buang, sambil sadar kalau gua masih nyimpen "kebanyakan". Tahap berikutnya adalah proses pindahan & penyimpanan yang sebenarnya, di mana barang-barang mungkin bakal dikurangin lagi. Tahap ini adalah penyaringan awal sebelum barang-barang yang disisihkan dikasih ke orang lain yang bakal ngangkut semuanya.
Masuk kategori: cara pindah dari rumah yang udah ditinggali selama 12 tahun & kota kelahiran selama 45 tahun, dengan asal-usul keluarga (& peninggalannya) dari 150 tahun lalu. Akhirnya gua pergi juga, demi nyari budaya yang cocok sama prinsip hidup gua.
#moverR

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.
